scripts.wp:restart: docker-compose down && cross-env THEME_SOURCE=src THEME_IS_DEV=true docker-compose up -d
scripts.kill-ports: for port in 5173 5174; do lsof -ti:$port | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; done
scripts.preview: npm run build && npm run wp:start:prod
scripts.wordmove:push:all: npm run build && bash -c 'source .env && THEME_SOURCE=release/$PRODUCTION_NAME docker-compose run --rm wordmove wordmove push -e production --all'
scripts.wordmove:push:theme: npm run build && bash -c 'source .env && THEME_SOURCE=release/$PRODUCTION_NAME docker-compose run --rm wordmove wordmove push -e production -t'
scripts.wordmove:push:db: bash -c 'source .env && THEME_SOURCE=release/$PRODUCTION_NAME docker-compose run --rm wordmove wordmove push -e production -d'
scripts.wordmove:push:uploads: docker-compose run --rm wordmove wordmove push -e production -u
scripts.wordmove:push:plugins: docker-compose run --rm wordmove wordmove push -e production -p
scripts.wordmove:pull:theme: bash -c 'source .env && THEME_SOURCE=release/$PRODUCTION_NAME docker-compose run --rm wordmove wordmove pull -e production -t'
scripts.wordmove:pull:db: docker-compose run --rm wordmove wordmove pull -e production -d
scripts.wordmove:pull:uploads: docker-compose run --rm wordmove wordmove pull -e production -u
scripts.wordmove:pull:plugins: docker-compose run --rm wordmove wordmove pull -e production -p
scripts.wordmove:pull:all: bash -c 'source .env && THEME_SOURCE=release/$PRODUCTION_NAME docker-compose run --rm wordmove wordmove pull -e production --all'
